violations.text: Sponges were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Molluscan Shellfish (clams ) located in (meat walk in cooler) was lacking identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty.PIC informed tags are required and must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumalation of debris: -all refrigerator units -window sill -hand sinks -ceiling vents in dining room -exterior ice machine -top of dishwasher -prep table shelves New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Dumpster area located in back of establishment observed with boxes and/or unnecessary items. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Garlic, tofu, and beef were observed held between 45-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed and removed the items from the prep unit and put in cooler. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units (under the shield/lid) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed inspector that two staff members are currently enrolled in food safety classes. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Inspector observed hand-washing sink near the fryers are missing handwashing signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Cooked rice was observed held at 105 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Minced garlic was observed held between 54-63 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC put garlic on ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units and can opener have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The ceiling vents in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen area (storage shelf). Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Inspector observed handwashing sink near the fryer and restrooms missing handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, dish racks, and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed and ice machine was taken out of service while on site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Pooled eggs were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Egg container put on ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by traps and droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Inspector observed opened cans stored under the prep table. Food items need to be wrapped to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Several items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Utensils (spoons and ladles), bowls, and strainers in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish washer. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in racks, walk-in floors, freezers, and lowboys, and under prep tables throughout have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Inspector observed the hand sink near the fryers is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -Walls, floors, shelving, hand sink, and piping (fryolator area); -Floors, storage shelves, and walls in the walk-in coolers; -Ceiling vents in the kitchen area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Inspector observed maintenance tools being stored under prep table with food items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen area (under prep table and dry storage shelf). Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
